title: centaurea × petri-montserratii
intro: Centaurea × petri-montserratii, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Centaurea montana and Centaurea scabiosa, is a perennial plant species known for its vibrant blue or pink flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues such as wounds, infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Centaurea × petri-montserratii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its flowers in water or oil, and can be used as teas, tinctures, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
